title: Howshama` #1953
definition:
Hoshama = "whom Jehovah hears"

 1) one of the sons of Jeconiah or Jehoiachin, the next to last king of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hoshama = "whom Jehovah hears"

 1) one of the sons of Jeconiah or Jehoiachin, the next to last king of Judah

    NASB:  Yah has heard, a desc. of the royal family of Judah
